calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up. Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Charlie W. Yu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Ryan Louie.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants.
Witness Ryan Louie sworn and examined.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-100 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Photos of Injuries
2-Police Report
3-Medical information
4-Hospital Bills

Court returns Plaintiff's exhibits to plaintiff's counsel.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Ryan Louie and against Defaulted Defendant Aaron Pruss AKA Aaron Cool DBA Sex Panther and Defendant Ryan Fontana DBA Sex Panther as follows:
Principal $78,282.70
Pre-Judgment Interest $15.677.98
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $615.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $94,575.68

Plaintiff's counsel to submit proposed judgment against defaulted Defendant Aaron Pruss AKA Aaron Cool DBA Sex Panther and Defendant Ryan Fontana DBA Sex Panther for court signature.

MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC.
Off Calendar Oct-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT BEYOND GROUP LLC'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC is Off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Miles R. Lendway, CSR # 13684 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Production Of Documents; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearancse:
Charlie W. Yu, Esq., Hedani Choy Spaulding & Salvagione LLP, Tel. 415.778.0800, appearing for the Plaintiff Ryan Louie.
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Counsel stipulated to Judge Pro Tem Peter Catalnotti. Ruling: the tentative ruling is adopted as follows: the unopposed Motion of Plaintiff Ryan Louie to Compel Answers to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Requests for Production of Documents is GRANTED. The request for sanctions in the amount of $2,010.00 is GRANTED. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not Reported. (302)
